metadata.description: Plugins that help you understand and optimize your agentic workflows. Brought to you by the Onlooker Community.

plugins.name: archivist
plugins.description: Structured session memory across context truncation

plugins.name: cartographer
plugins.description: Periodic audit of CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/ files for contradictions, stale references, and dead rules. The only proactive audit layer in the ecosystem — surfaces instruction health issues before they cause agent misbehavior.

plugins.name: counsel
plugins.description: Weekly synthesis and recommendations — layer-attributed improvement briefs from your observability stack

plugins.name: cues
plugins.description: Cues are contextual guidance injected automatically based on triggers

plugins.name: echo
plugins.description: Prompt regression testing — measurable before/after signals for agent file changes

plugins.name: ledger
plugins.description: Resource governance and budget enforcement for Claude Code. Tracks token consumption and cost across all plugin activity. Blocks agent spawning when session budgets are exceeded.

plugins.name: onlooker
plugins.description: Local observability for agentic workflows — telemetry, friction analysis, cost tracking, and weekly insights

plugins.name: oracle
plugins.description: Confidence calibration before action — catches misaligned work before it becomes expensive to reverse

plugins.name: relay
plugins.description: Session continuity bridge. Captures immediate task state at session end — what you were doing, what's next, what's blocking — and injects it as the first thing Claude sees when you reopen.

plugins.name: scribe
plugins.description: Intent documentation from agent activity — captures why, not what

plugins.name: sentinel
plugins.description: Pre-flight safety gate for destructive Bash operations

plugins.name: tribunal
plugins.description: Post-run evaluation and quality scoring for LLM outputs.

plugins.name: warden
plugins.description: Indirect prompt injection detection — scans retrieved content and gates agent actions when threats are detected
